zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Courtenay於大約1220年出生在英國英格蘭戴文奧可哈普頓時，他的父親Robert de Courtenay38歲，母親Mary de Vernon39歲。他於大約1238年與Joan Basset結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1262年12月24日之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Courtenay于大约1220年出生在英国英格兰戴文奧可哈普頓时，他的父亲Robert de Courtenay38岁，母亲Mary de Vernon39岁。他于大约1238年与Joan Basset结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1262年12月24日之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Courtenay was born about 1220, in Okehampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Courtenay, was 38 and his mother, Mary de Vernon, was 39. He married Joan Basset about 1238. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died after 24 December 1262.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Courtenay est né environ 1220, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Courtenay, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mary de Vernon, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Joan Basset environ 1238. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé après 24 décembre 1262.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Courtenay um 1220 in Okehampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Courtenay 38 und seine Mutter Mary de Vernon 39. Er hat um 1238 Joan Basset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 24. Dezember 1262.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Courtenay è nato il circa 1220 nel Okehampton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Courtenay, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Mary de Vernon, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Joan Basset circa 1238. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 24 dicembre 1262.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Courtenay(이)가 대략 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오케함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Courtenay(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary de Vernon(은)는 39세였다. 그는 대략 1238년 Joan Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1262년 12월 24일 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Courtenay nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Courtenay, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Vernon, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Basset aproximadamente 1238. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 24 de dezembro de 1262.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Courtenay родился около 1220 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Courtenay было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary de Vernon, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Basset около 1238 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер после 24 декабрь 1262 г.
